cases.name: remote-tag
expected: remote uses must use a forty-character commit SHA

cases.name: missing-version-comment
expected: remote uses must retain a version comment

cases.name: mutable-docker
expected: docker uses must use a sha256 digest

cases.name: broad-write
expected: workflow default permissions must be read-only

cases.name: unlisted-write
expected: write permission is not allowlisted

cases.name: write-all
expected: write-all is forbidden

cases.name: unpinned-suppression
expected: unpinned-uses suppression is forbidden

repositoryBoundaryCases.name: missing-root

expected: repository root must be an existing non-symlink directory

expected: .github must be an existing non-symlink directory

repositoryBoundaryCases.name: github-symlink
expected: .github must be an existing non-symlink directory

repositoryBoundaryCases.name: missing-workflows
expected: workflow directory must be an existing non-symlink directory

repositoryBoundaryCases.name: workflows-symlink
expected: workflow directory must be an existing non-symlink directory

repositoryBoundaryCases.name: empty-workflows
expected: workflow directory must contain at least one regular workflow YAML file

repositoryBoundaryCases.name: workflow-file-symlink
expected: workflow YAML must be a non-symlink regular file

repositoryBoundaryCases.name: workflow-nonregular-file
expected: workflow YAML must be a non-symlink regular file

repositoryBoundaryCases.name: zizmor-symlink
expected: zizmor configuration must be a non-symlink regular file
